questionHtml: Explain why the change of entropy for the gas during the process BC is equal to zero.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

«the process is adiabatic so» ΔQ = 0 ✓

 

ALTERNATIVE 2

The compression is reversible «so ΔS = 0» ✓

 

OWTTE
